app/main.py.responsibility: FastAPI application entry point; lifespan handler initializes database, loads frameworks, seeds default stakeholders; mounts all routers

app/models.py.responsibility: Pydantic request/response models, SQLAlchemy ORM models, enums (ScoringMethod, RiskLevel, ConflictLevel, StakeholderRole), constants (UNIFIED_DIMENSIONS, LIKERT_MIN/MAX)

app/scoring_engine.py.responsibility: Core scoring algorithms: TOPSIS, WSM, AHP eigenvector method, Likert normalization, weight validation

app/framework_registry.py.responsibility: Loads ethical framework YAML definitions, seeds default stakeholder profiles into database, provides framework/stakeholder lookup

app/audit_log.py.responsibility: Writes JSON audit records for API calls to data/audit_logs/

app/harm_assessment.py.responsibility: Builds harm assessment objects for conflict analysis

app/routers/evaluate.py.responsibility: POST /api/evaluate endpoint; computes multi-framework multi-stakeholder evaluation scores using TOPSIS or WSM
app/routers/evaluate.py.input: EvaluateRequest (ai_system with dimension_scores, framework_ids, stakeholder_ids, scoring_method, optional weights)
app/routers/evaluate.py.output: EvaluationResult (framework_scores with per-framework score, dimension_scores, risk_level; overall_score)

app/routers/conflicts.py.responsibility: POST /api/conflicts endpoint; detects stakeholder priority conflicts using Spearman rank correlation on weight vectors or contribution vectors
app/routers/conflicts.py.output: ConflictReport (conflicts with spearman_rho, conflict_level, stakeholder pair info; harm_assessment)

app/routers/pareto.py.responsibility: POST /api/pareto endpoint; computes Pareto-optimal consensus weight vectors using NSGA-II multi-objective optimization (pymoo)
app/routers/pareto.py.input: ParetoRequest (ai_system, framework_id, stakeholder_ids, n_solutions, pop_size, n_gen, seed)
app/routers/pareto.py.output: ConflictReport (pareto_solutions with consensus weights, objective_scores, rank; metadata)

streamlit_app.py.responsibility: Streamlit frontend UI with 4 pages: Evaluate, Conflict Detection, Pareto Resolution, Case Studies; includes KPI strip, methodology summary, radar charts, parallel coordinates, bundle export

app/frameworks/eu_altai.yaml.responsibility: EU ALTAI framework definition with dimension weights and assessment questions

app/frameworks/nist_ai_rmf.yaml.responsibility: NIST AI RMF framework definition with dimension weights and assessment questions

app/frameworks/sg_mgaf.yaml.responsibility: Singapore MGAF framework definition with dimension weights and assessment questions

case_studies/facial_recognition.json.responsibility: Case study 1: Facial recognition surveillance deployment with dimension scores and provenance metadata

case_studies/hiring_algorithm.json.responsibility: Case study 2: Hiring algorithm screening with dimension scores and provenance metadata

case_studies/healthcare_diagnostic.json.responsibility: Case study 3: Healthcare diagnostic AI (DeepMind Streams) with dimension scores and provenance metadata

api_endpoints.description: Stakeholder conflict detection via Spearman rho
